title: lotus commutatus var. collinus
intro: Lotus commutatus var. collinus, also known as Lotus var. collinus, is a variety of the Lotus plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. The medicinal properties of Lotus commutatus var. collinus include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects, which may help to soothe digestive issues and relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of consuming or applying Lotus commutatus var. collinus preparations include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from urinary issues. Herbal preparations of Lotus commutatus var. collinus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their effects.
